mnemonics: TEST Components: Time, Efficiency, Structure, Test Cases. Think: To Ensure Software Thrives, Check Thoroughly.
keyPoints: Testing verifies the algorithm's correctness and performance against requirements.
It involves checking for expected output, edge cases, and time/space complexity.
A test plan should include a variety of inputs to validate all possible scenarios.
commonMistakes: Only testing with 'normal' inputs and neglecting edge cases or invalid inputs.
Assuming an algorithm is correct after a few successful tests without rigorous validation.
Ignoring performance testing, leading to scalability issues in real-world applications.
